footer.tagline: A web agency specialised in professional website creation and Google search engine optimisation.

meta.title: Agency — Web design & SEO agency: build a website that ranks on Google
meta.description: Web agency specialised in professional website creation and Google SEO. Showcase sites, e-commerce, redesigns and tailor-made search engine optimisation for ambitious brands.

hero.title: Websites that convert. SEO that ranks.
hero.subtitle: We design fast, elegant, SEO-ready websites. Every project is tailor-made to turn your visibility into customers.

services.title: A full-service web agency, from design to SEO
services.subtitle: Two complementary skill sets to build an online presence that works for you 24/7.
services.webDescription: WordPress showcase sites, Shopify stores and custom builds. Modern design, optimal performance, perfect accessibility.
services.seoDescription: Google SEO, Google Ads and social media. Every marketing action aligned with your acquisition strategy.

why.title: A web agency that measures impact, not output.
why.subtitle: We refuse approximation. Every design decision, every line of code and every keyword is chosen to serve your business goals.

items.title: Obsessive performance
items.body: Lighthouse score of 100, Core Web Vitals in the green, sub-second load times. Speed is both an SEO and a sales lever.

items.title: SEO baked into design
items.body: Semantic structure, Schema.org markup, internal linking, multilingual hreflang: SEO is built in, never bolted on.

items.title: Design that converts
items.body: Modern aesthetics aren't enough. Every section is engineered to guide visitors towards the action that matters to you.

items.title: Transparent partnership
items.body: A single point of contact, a clear timeline, monthly reporting. You always know where your project and your ROI stand.

process.title: A proven process, with no nasty surprises
process.subtitle: A four-step methodology to deliver a high-performing website and lasting SEO results.

steps.title: Strategic framing
steps.body: Discovery workshop, audit of the existing site, competitor research and target keyword definition. We lay solid foundations before the first mockup.

steps.title: Design & architecture
steps.body: UX/UI mockups, information architecture, SEO sitemap and collaborative validation through interactive prototypes.

steps.title: Development & technical SEO
steps.body: Modern Next.js development, pixel-perfect implementation, Schema.org markup, multilingual sitemap and optimised performance.

steps.title: Launch & growth
steps.body: Go-live, ranking monitoring, monthly SEO iterations, conversion rate optimisation and transparent reporting.

items.quote: Our organic traffic tripled in six months and we're finally ranking first on our strategic keywords. The team is responsive and skilled.
items.author: Sophie Laurent

items.quote: A modern, lightning-fast and perfectly optimised website. Agency met every commitment, on time and on budget.
items.author: Julien Morel

items.quote: Clear process, gorgeous design, killer SEO. Our qualified leads doubled in the first quarter.
items.author: Clara Benedetti

items.q: How much does a professional website cost?
items.a: A WordPress showcase site starts around €1,500, a Shopify e-commerce store from €3,000, and a custom-built site from €5,000. Every quote follows a free scoping call.

items.q: How long does it take to deliver a website?
items.a: A showcase site is delivered in 4 to 6 weeks, a more complex project in 8 to 12 weeks. We work in sprints with full visibility on every milestone.
Technical SEO is built into every website project. Editorial SEO and link building are offered as an optional monthly retainer.

items.q: Do you work with international clients?
items.a: Yes. We support clients across Europe, Spain and Canada. Multilingual mastery is at the heart of our projects.

items.q: Will I own the website after launch?
items.a: Absolutely. You own the source code and the content. We train your team and stay available for any future need.

cta.title: Ready to step it up?
cta.subtitle: Let's talk about your project. Free SEO audit, quote within 48 hours.

content.intro: Agency is a French web agency specialised in professional website creation and Google SEO. We design high-performing digital experiences for SMBs and scale-ups that want to turn their site into a true acquisition engine.
paragraphs: A modern website is no longer a static brochure. It is a business asset that has to attract, convince and convert. At Agency we craft websites that combine careful design, an SEO-friendly architecture and outstanding performance.
Google SEO sits at the heart of our approach. From the very first mockups, we work on semantic structure, Hn tags, Schema.org structured data, Core Web Vitals and content architecture.

Whether it is a WordPress showcase site, a Shopify e-commerce store, a custom-built platform, a Google Ads campaign or a social media strategy, our methodology stays the same: listen, measure, design, ship, iterate.

meta.title: Professional website creation — Agency
meta.description: Custom website creation: WordPress showcase, Shopify e-commerce, custom Next.js. Modern design, built-in SEO, fast delivery.

hero.title: Your website. Your best salesperson. 24/7.
hero.subtitle: We build showcase sites, e-commerce stores and custom platforms that turn visitors into clients. Premium design, native SEO, maximum performance.

pain.title: Problems we solve
items: Your current site generates zero leads or sales
You have a slow site that drives visitors away
You pay for hosting on a site that is never updated
Your site appears nowhere on Google

serviceWeb.solutionTitle: What we actually do for you

sections.title: Design that sells, not just decorates
sections.body: Every page, button, and color is designed to push visitors to contact you. We don't do pretty for pretty's sake — we do design that converts.

sections.title: Fast. Really fast.
sections.body: Lighthouse score 100/100. Your site loads in under 2 seconds. Google loves that, your visitors too. No more load times, no more lost clients.

sections.title: Visible on Google from day one
sections.body: Technical SEO is baked into the code: Schema.org, sitemap, optimized URLs, meta tags. Your site is ready to rank from launch day.

sections.title: You keep total control
sections.body: We train you, we hand over the keys. You can edit texts, add pages, without calling us. Full autonomy, support available if needed.

midCta.title: Ready for a site that works for you?
midCta.subtitle: We chat, propose mockups, you choose. Zero commitment.

steps.title: We talk
steps.desc: Call or video to understand your business, goals and preferences.

steps.title: We propose
steps.desc: We present templates and mockups tailored to your industry.

steps.title: We build
steps.desc: You approve the design, we code. Unlimited changes until satisfaction.

steps.title: We deliver
steps.desc: Site live, training included, you are autonomous.

cta.title: Let's talk about your future site
cta.subtitle: Call us or fill the form. We get back to you within 48h with a concrete proposal.

meta.title: Professional WordPress showcase site — Agency
meta.description: WordPress showcase website with Salient theme. Unique design, built-in SEO, optimal performance. Free quote within 48h.

hero.title: A pro showcase site. That brings you clients. Not just likes.
hero.subtitle: We create your WordPress showcase site with Salient: professional design, built-in SEO, and you can modify everything yourself.

pain.title: Why most showcase sites fail
items: Generic WordPress themes that look like 10,000 other sites
A site never updated because too hard to modify
A design that doesn't reflect the seriousness of your business
A site that doesn't appear on Google, even when searching your name

serviceVitrine.solutionTitle: Your WordPress showcase, built to sell

sections.title: Salient: the premium theme we master
sections.body: We use Salient, one of the most powerful themes on the market. No copy-pasted templates: we customize everything so your site is unique.

sections.title: You modify everything, no code needed
sections.body: Texts, images, pages — you manage everything from WordPress. We train you in 30 minutes, you are autonomous.

sections.title: Visible on Google, fast
sections.body: Complete SEO setup: Rank Math, optimized tags, XML sitemap, Schema.org. Your site is built for Google to find and rank.

sections.title: Fast, secure, properly hosted
sections.body: Optimized cache, CDN, compressed images, HTTPS, automatic backups. Your site is fast and protected, not just pretty.

midCta.title: Your showcase site online in 3 weeks
midCta.subtitle: We handle everything. You approve the design, we deliver.

steps.title: Exchange
steps.desc: We understand your business, needs and visual preferences.

steps.title: Proposal
steps.desc: We send mockups based on Salient, adapted to your industry.

steps.title: Customization
steps.desc: You approve, we adjust until it is perfect for you.

steps.title: Delivery
steps.desc: Launch + WordPress training. You are operational.

deliverables.title: What is included in your showcase site
items: Custom design with Salient (no copied template)
Pages: Home, About, Services, Contact (+ as needed)
Speed optimization and Core Web Vitals

cta.title: Ready for a real pro site?
cta.subtitle: Free quote, fast delivery, zero hassle.

meta.description: Custom Shopify store creation. Product catalog, secure payment, e-commerce SEO. Start selling online now.

pain.title: Why your online store isn't taking off
items: Product pages that don't make people want to buy
A complicated checkout that drives customers away

serviceEcommerce.solutionTitle: A Shopify store built to sell

sections.title: A design that triggers purchase
sections.body: Optimized product pages, smooth checkout funnel, striking visuals. Every element reduces hesitation and pushes to action.

sections.title: Intelligently structured product catalog
sections.body: Collections, filters, variants (size, color, material), real-time stock management. Smooth navigation, even with thousands of products.

sections.title: Payment in 3 clicks, secure
sections.body: Shopify Payments, Stripe, PayPal, Apple Pay — every payment method to never lose a customer. Mobile-optimized checkout.

sections.title: Native e-commerce SEO
sections.body: Optimized URLs, Product Schema, automatic metas, product sitemap. Your products appear on Google and Google Shopping naturally.

midCta.title: Every day without a store = lost sales
midCta.subtitle: Your Shopify store can be live in 4 to 6 weeks.

steps.title: Product brief
steps.desc: We understand your products, target audience and sales goals.

steps.title: Store design
steps.desc: Custom Shopify theme mockups, product pages, checkout.

steps.title: Development
steps.desc: Catalog integration, payment, transactional emails, tracking.

steps.title: Launch
steps.desc: Store live + Shopify training. You manage orders autonomously.

deliverables.title: Everything included in your store
items: Custom Shopify design (not a raw theme)

cta.title: Your Shopify store, ready to sell
cta.subtitle: We create, you sell. Free quote, no commitment.

meta.title: Custom Next.js website — Agency
meta.description: Custom web development with Next.js, React, Tailwind. Absolute performance, native SEO, no technical limits.

hero.title: A website without compromise. Built to dominate.
hero.subtitle: When WordPress and Shopify aren't enough, we develop your site from scratch with Next.js. Absolute performance, limitless design, native SEO.

pain.title: The limits of classic solutions
items: WordPress struggles with too many plugins and customizations
Your project has needs that CMS platforms can't handle
You want an ultra-fast site, not a compromise
You need specific business integrations (API, CRM, ERP)

sections.title: Next.js + React: the stack of leaders
sections.body: The same stack as Vercel, Notion, Linear. Ultra-fast static rendering, smooth interactions, perfect SEO. Your site loads instantly.

sections.title: Pixel-perfect design, premium animations
sections.body: Without theme constraints, the design is exactly what you want. Smooth animations, micro-interactions, world-class user experience.

sections.title: Unbeatable performance
sections.body: Lighthouse score 100/100, LCP under 1 second, zero sluggish plugins. Every line of code is optimized. Your competitors can't keep up.

sections.title: Custom integrations
sections.body: Headless CMS, CRM, third-party APIs, payments, authentication — we connect everything your business needs. Scalable architecture, no tech debt.

midCta.title: Your project deserves more than a template
midCta.subtitle: Let's talk tech. Free scoping within 48h.

steps.title: Scoping
steps.desc: We define together the architecture, features and integrations.

steps.title: Design
steps.desc: High-fidelity mockups, interactive prototyping. You approve each screen.

steps.title: Development
steps.desc: Clean code, tested, continuously deployed. You track progress in real-time.

steps.title: Delivery
steps.desc: Deployed on Vercel, documentation, training. Your site is in production.

deliverables.title: What is included in your custom project

cta.title: Let's talk about your ambitious project
cta.subtitle: Free technical scoping. We get back to you within 48h with an estimate.

meta.title: SEO Agency & Google ranking — Agency
meta.description: Technical SEO, content and link building. We position your site in the top Google results for your strategic keywords.

hero.title: Page one of Google. Not page three.
hero.subtitle: We implement everything needed for your site to climb Google: technical, content, links. No empty promises — methodical work that delivers results.

pain.title: Why your site doesn't appear on Google
items: Your site has no keyword strategy
Content is too thin or poorly structured for Google
No other sites link to yours (no backlinks)

serviceSeo.solutionTitle: Our SEO method, step by step

sections.title: Complete audit: we diagnose everything
sections.body: Technical analysis (crawl, indexation, speed), semantic (keywords, intents, competition) and off-site (backlinks, authority). We identify exactly what blocks and what will accelerate.

sections.title: Technical SEO: the foundations
sections.body: Core Web Vitals, Hn structure, canonical URLs, sitemap, Schema.org markup, hreflang. We make your site technically perfect for Google.

sections.title: Content optimized for the right queries
sections.body: We identify keywords your customers actually search for and create content that answers them. Not content for content's sake — content that ranks and converts.

sections.title: Link building: gaining authority
sections.body: Quality backlinks from relevant sites in your industry. Guest posts, partnerships, digital PR. Your domain gains credibility with Google.

midCta.title: SEO takes time. All the more reason to start now.
midCta.subtitle: Every month that passes, your competitors get further ahead.

steps.title: Audit
steps.desc: Complete analysis of your site, competitors and opportunities.

steps.title: Strategy
steps.desc: Prioritized action plan: quick wins + long-term actions.

steps.title: Execution
steps.desc: Technical optimizations, content, link building. We progress every month.

steps.title: Reporting
steps.desc: Position tracking, traffic, conversions. Clear report every month.

deliverables.title: What the SEO package includes
items: Keyword strategy and search intent mapping

cta.title: Your SEO audit, free and no commitment
cta.subtitle: We analyze your site and tell you exactly what to do. Within 7 days.

meta.title: Google Ads — Agency
meta.description: Optimized Google Ads campaigns: precise targeting, compelling ads, maximized ROI. Clients, not just clicks.

hero.title: Clients tomorrow morning. Not in 6 months.
hero.subtitle: We create and manage your Google Ads campaigns to attract qualified prospects immediately. Controlled budget, measurable results, transparent ROI.

pain.title: Why your Google ads don't work
items: You spend budget on clicks that don't convert
Your ads show up on the wrong keywords
No dedicated landing page — traffic lands on your homepage
No conversion tracking, impossible to know what works

sections.title: The right keywords, the right clients
sections.body: We target only queries with buying intent. No curious clicks that cost money — prospects ready to contact you now.

sections.title: Ads that make people want to click
sections.body: Punchy headlines, clear benefits, complete ad extensions. Every ad is A/B tested to keep only what performs.

sections.title: Landing pages that convert
sections.body: Traffic lands on dedicated pages, not your homepage. Message aligned with the ad, visible form, social proof. Result: more conversions for the same budget.

sections.title: Continuous optimization, transparent reporting
sections.body: We adjust bids, cut what doesn't work, amplify what converts. Every euro spent is justified in a clear monthly report.

midCta.title: Your competitors are already on Google Ads
midCta.subtitle: Every day without a campaign = clients going to them.

steps.title: Audit & Strategy
steps.desc: Market analysis, keyword selection, recommended budget.

steps.title: Creation
steps.desc: Campaigns, ad groups, ad copy and landing pages.

steps.title: Launch
steps.desc: Live, conversion tracking configured, first results.

steps.title: Optimization
steps.desc: A/B tests, bid adjustments, scaling what works.

cta.title: Results from the first week
cta.subtitle: Free audit of your current campaigns. Recommendations within 48h.

meta.title: TikTok & Instagram social media management — Agency
meta.description: Social media strategy, TikTok content creation, Instagram Reels and YouTube Shorts. We manage your socials, you manage your business.

hero.title: Your social media. Managed by pros. Finally.
hero.subtitle: We handle your TikTok, Instagram and YouTube Shorts: strategy, content creation, publishing, analysis. Your brand is visible where your clients are.

pain.title: Why your social media isn't growing
items: You post when you remember (meaning never)
No strategy, no editorial line, no consistency
Trends change too fast to keep up
You don't have time to create quality content

serviceSocial.solutionTitle: A pro social presence, zero effort on your part

sections.title: Custom strategy for your brand
sections.body: We define your voice, editorial line and publishing calendar. Consistent, regular, aligned with your business goals.

sections.title: TikTok: capture attention, create virality
sections.body: Short, dynamic, authentic video content. The first 3 seconds capture, the rest converts. We ride trends to maximize organic reach.

sections.title: Instagram Reels & Stories: engaged community
sections.body: Cohesive feed, performing Reels, engaging Stories. We animate your community daily: strategic hashtags, comment responses, collaborations.

sections.title: YouTube Shorts: multi-platform presence
sections.body: We adapt your short-form content for YouTube Shorts. Same creative effort, multiplied visibility. Your brand is everywhere your clients are.

midCta.title: While you hesitate, your competitors are posting
midCta.subtitle: We take over your social media. First month no commitment.

steps.title: Audit
steps.desc: Analysis of your current accounts, audience and competitors.

steps.title: Strategy
steps.desc: Editorial line, publishing calendar, content formats.

steps.title: Creation
steps.desc: We produce visuals, videos and texts. You approve before publishing.

steps.title: Publish & analyze
steps.desc: We publish, engage, analyze. Monthly performance report.

deliverables.title: What social media management includes
items: Complete audit of your current presence

cta.title: Your social media, finally managed
cta.subtitle: Free audit of your accounts. First month no commitment.

meta.title: About — Agency, web design & SEO agency in Paris
meta.description: Agency is an independent web agency based in Paris. Specialised in website creation and Google SEO, we serve ambitious brands.

hero.title: The web agency that refuses half-measures.
hero.subtitle: Founded in 2018 in Paris, Agency partners with companies that want the web to become a real growth lever.

sections.title: An independent, committed web agency
sections.body: Agency was born from a simple belief: it is possible to deliver elegant, high-performing and perfectly optimised websites without compromise. Independent, we choose our clients the way we choose our tools: with high standards.

sections.title: A multi-disciplinary team
sections.body: Designers, front-end and back-end developers, SEO experts, web copywriters: our team covers every skill set required to deliver an ambitious digital project.

sections.title: Values that drive every project
sections.body: We believe in transparency (timeline, budget, reporting), in technical excellence (Lighthouse 100, Core Web Vitals in the green), in pedagogy and in the long term (our clients stay with us for an average of 4 years).

sections.title: Paris, the French-speaking world and beyond
sections.body: Based in Paris, we partner with clients across the French-speaking world, in Spain and in Canada. Multilingual mastery lets us build websites that perform on several markets at once.

items.title: Total transparency
items.body: Timeline, budget, source code, analytics: it all belongs to you and is shared with you.

items.title: Technical excellence
items.body: Lighthouse 100, Core Web Vitals in the green, strict TypeScript. No compromise.

items.title: Real collaboration
items.body: A dedicated point of contact, clear rituals, real availability. No endless email chains.

items.title: Measurable impact
items.body: We track the indicators that matter to you: qualified traffic, conversions, revenue.

meta.title: Privacy Policy — Agency
meta.description: Agency privacy policy: personal data collection, purposes, GDPR rights and cookies.

sections.title: 1. Data Controller
sections.body:
The data controller for personal data collected on agency.example.com is:

Emir Sen
Sole proprietor
60 rue François 1er, 75008 Paris, France
Contact: contact@agency.example.com

sections.title: 2. Data Collected
sections.body:
When you use the contact form, we collect the following data:

• Name
• Email address

This data is collected when you fill out and submit the contact form. No other personal data is collected automatically.

sections.title: 3. Purpose of Processing
sections.body: The personal data collected is used solely to respond to your contact or information request. It is not used for any other purpose (commercial prospecting, resale to third parties, profiling, etc.).

sections.title: 4. Legal Basis
sections.body: The processing of your personal data is based on your consent (Article 6.1.a of the GDPR), expressed by submitting the contact form, and on the performance of pre-contractual measures taken at your request (Article 6.1.b of the GDPR).

sections.title: 5. Data Recipients
sections.body: Data collected through the contact form is sent by email to Emir Sen only. It is not shared with any third party, subcontractor or partner. No data is stored in a database or CRM.

sections.title: 6. Data Retention
sections.body: Data submitted through the form is kept in our email inbox for the time necessary to process your request. In the absence of an established business relationship, data is deleted within a maximum of 3 years from your last contact, in accordance with CNIL recommendations.

sections.title: 7. Your Rights
sections.body:
In accordance with the General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR), you have the following rights:

• Right of access to your personal data
• Right of rectification
• Right of erasure ("right to be forgotten")
• Right to restriction of processing
• Right to object to processing
• Right to data portability

To exercise these rights, send your request by email to contact@agency.example.com with a copy of your ID. We will respond within one month.

In case of dispute, you may file a complaint with the CNIL (French Data Protection Authority): www.cnil.fr

sections.title: 8. Cookies
sections.body: This website does not use any advertising cookies, tracking cookies or third-party cookies. Only strictly necessary technical cookies (language preference, light/dark theme preference) may be stored in your browser. These technical cookies do not require your consent under Article 82 of the French Data Protection Act.

sections.title: 9. Data Transfers Outside the EU
sections.body: The website is hosted by GitHub, Inc. (United States). Data transmitted through the contact form may therefore transit through servers located outside the European Union. GitHub adheres to the EU-US Data Privacy Framework (DPF), ensuring an adequate level of protection in accordance with GDPR requirements.

sections.title: 10. Policy Changes
sections.body: This privacy policy may be updated at any time. The date of the last update is indicated below. We invite you to consult it regularly. Last update: April 2026.
